final:
module SRAM_16bit (
    input wire clk,
    input wire [3:0] address,
    input wire [15:0] data_in,
    input wire read_enable,
    input wire write_enable,
    output reg [15:0] data_out
);
    reg [15:0] sram_storage [15:0]; // 16 words of 16 bits each

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (write_enable) begin
            sram_storage[address] <= data_in; // Write data to sram_storage
        end
        if (read_enable) begin
            data_out <= sram_storage[address]; // Read data from sram_storage
        end
    end
endmodule
